app.title: Video App Studio
app.subtitle: APK-ready SaaS shell for script, voice, image, and video tools

script_generation.label: Script Generator
script_generation.tier_note: Free gets a few daily prompts. Pro is for bulk script generation.
script_generation.description: Generates copyable short scripts using your small prompt plus fixed in-app rules for Roman Hindi / Urdu, Pakistan / India audience tone, and production-friendly pacing.
script_generation.best_for: Episode ideas, short scenes, dialogue drafts, hook lines, and cliffhangers.

audio_generation.label: Audio Generation
audio_generation.tier_note: Uses the same voice profiles adapted from the working pipelines.
audio_generation.description: Turns script text into downloadable speech using the same voice profile logic adapted from the production pipelines.
audio_generation.best_for: Voiceovers, dialogue blocks, preview narration, and final speech exports.

background_remove.label: Background Remover
background_remove.tier_note: Offline if optional local engines are packaged. Otherwise wire a remote engine.
background_remove.description: Removes the background from an image or transparent clip source so characters and objects can be reused in edits.
background_remove.best_for: Character cutouts, pose assets, transparent overlays, and subject isolation.

overlay_compose.label: Static Pose or Clip Overlay
overlay_compose.tier_note: Image overlay works locally. Video overlay needs MoviePy at runtime.
overlay_compose.description: Places a pose image or transparent clip on top of an image or video using x/y position, size, and opacity.
overlay_compose.best_for: Character staging, meme overlays, pose placement, and reusable composition.

position_preset.label: Position Lock Presets
position_preset.tier_note: Stores reusable x/y/width/height layouts like positionlock.py.
position_preset.description: Saves position and size presets for assets so the same character placement can be reused scene after scene.
position_preset.best_for: Consistent layouts, repeatable scene blocking, and faster batch edits.

pose_standardize.label: Character Resize Ready
pose_standardize.tier_note: Uses the same bottom-center ready.py style for character assets.
pose_standardize.description: Resizes a character or pose image to a standard canvas and anchors it bottom-center the same way as the existing ready.py flow.
pose_standardize.best_for: Preparing static poses, PNG cutouts, and standard mobile-frame character assets.

background_resize.label: Background Resize
background_resize.tier_note: Uses the same blurred-fill flow from background_resize.py.
background_resize.description: Resizes a full background image into a shorts-friendly frame using centered placement plus a blurred fill layer.
background_resize.best_for: Portrait video backgrounds, story scenes, and reused landscape art.

pexels_search.label: Pexels Search and Download
pexels_search.tier_note: Searches and downloads Pexels media through the API.
pexels_search.description: Searches the Pexels API with a text query and downloads matching images or clips into the app outputs.
pexels_search.best_for: Quick stock footage, scene references, filler visuals, and background sourcing.

style_rules: Use modern Roman Urdu / Roman Hindi with a desi internet vibe.
Keep the pacing sharp and retain the chaotic energy from the existing episode pipeline.
Make the lines readable for Pakistan and India audiences.
Avoid formal Urdu and avoid JSON output.
Keep scenes clip-worthy and useful for video production.
